song_details.name: Lambodara
song_details.arohanam: S R1 M1 P D1 S
song_details.avarohanam: S D1 P M1 G3 R1 S

content.swara: M P     | D S S R || R S  | D P M P ||
Sree -  | Ga na na tha || sin dhu | - ra var  na ||
content.sahitya: ... and the ocean of compassion (“karuna sagara”). You have the visage (“vadana”) of the mighty

content.swara: R M  | P D M P || D P | M G R S ||
Ka ru  | na Sa ga ra || ka ri | va  dha - na ||
content.sahitya: ... and a   protruding belly (“lambodara”). You hold goddess lakshmi (“lakumi”) in your hand (“kara”).

content.swara: S -  | R M G R || S R | G R S , ||
Lam -  | bo - dha ra || la ku | mi ka ra - ||
content.sahitya: O son of Parvathi (“amba sutha”) you are worshipped by (“vinutha”) the gods (“amara”).

content.swara: R M  | P D M P || D P | M G R S ||
Am -  | ba - su tha || a ma | ra vi nu tha ||
S -  | R M G R || S R | G R S , ||
Lam -  | bo - dha ra || la ku | mi ka ra - ||
M P     | D S S R || R S  | D P M P ||
Sid dha | cha - ra na || ga na | se - vi  tha ||
content.sahitya: You grant your devotees all their wishes (“siddhi vinayaka”) and I bow to you  (“the namo ”).

content.swara: R M  | P D M P || D P | M G R S ||
Sid dhi  | vi na ya ka || the - | na mo na  mo ||
M P     | D S S R || R S  | D P M P ||
Sa ka  | la vi dya - || - dhi | pu - ji  tha ||
content.sahitya: You are the greatest one of all (“sarvothama”) and I pray to you.

content.swara: R M  | P D M P || D P | M G R S ||
Sa -  | rvo - tha ma || the - | na mo na  mo ||
